THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION TO QUASH IS DENIED AND THE ALTERNATIVE REQUEST FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE REQUEST THAT RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS BE PROVIDED TO A CPA IS DENIED AND THE REQUEST THAT THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENA BE LIMITED AND INFORMATION NOT RELATING TO THE PROPERTY AT ISSUE IN THIS SUIT BE REDACTED IS GRANTED. INTER-AMERICANA SHALL IMMEDIATELY PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF. THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENA SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE PERIOD FROM 2005 UNTIL 2010. INTER-AMERICANA SHALL REDACT ANY INFORMATION NOT RELATING TO THE PROPERTIES AT ISSUE IN THIS LITIGATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
